entry.title: Tirreno-Adriatico 2020 - Pascal Ackermann : ‘My sprint felt amazing’

link.title: Tirreno-Adriatico 2020 - Pascal Ackermann : ‘My sprint felt amazing’

entry.content: En manque de réussite dernièrement sur le Tour de Pologne, les Championnats d’Allemagne ou encore les Championnats d’Europe, Pascal Ackermann a retrouvé le chemin du succès ce lundi lors de la première étape de Tirreno-Adriatico. Impressionnant de puissance et de vitesse pour revenir puis déborder tous ses adversaires, et notamment son dauphin Fernando Gaviria (UAE-Team Emirates), le sprinteur de la BORA-hansgrohe - les fesses sur la selle dans les 50 derniers mètres ! - était tout sourire après l’arrivée.
entry.summary: En manque de réussite dernièrement sur le Tour de Pologne, les Championnats d’Allemagne ou encore les Championnats d’Europe, Pascal Ackermann a retrouvé le chemin du succès ce lundi lors de la première étape de Tirreno-Adriatico. Impressionnant de puissance et de vitesse pour revenir puis déborder tous ses adversaires, et notamment son dauphin Fernando Gaviria (UAE-Team Emirates), le sprinteur de la BORA-hansgrohe - les fesses sur la selle dans les 50 derniers mètres ! - était tout sourire après l’arrivée.

entry.title: India loses in 15 world indicators in one year.

link.title: India loses in 15 world indicators in one year.

entry.content:
Indian economy stands devastated with lowest GDP and no signs of recovery. Not only the economy but the country has slipped ranks drastically in more than a dozen global indices in just one year.Latest being the Economic Freedom index, India came down 26 ranks in the world.
#PMModi #GDP #Unemployment #BJP #Congress
entry.summary: Indian economy stands devastated with lowest GDP and no signs of recovery. Not only the economy but the country has slipped ranks drastically in more than a dozen global indices in just one year.Latest being the Economic Freedom index, India came down 26 ranks in the world. #PMModi #GDP #Unemployment #BJP #Congress

entry.title: How To Talk To Your Teenagers About Life Insurance

link.title: How To Talk To Your Teenagers About Life Insurance

entry.content:
Actress and model Brooke Shields started teaching her daughters more about money after they spent a summer working.
One of their money conversations has been about life insurance.
Shields and her daughter discussed why lifer insurance is important and what’s already set up for their family.
Shields says that she makes the conversation about financial responsibility above all else to keep it light.
She also let her children ask the questions, and puts it into their terms.
entry.summary: Actress and model Brooke Shields started teaching her daughters more about money after they spent a summer working. One of their money conversations has been about life insurance. Shields and her daughter discussed why lifer insurance is important and what’s already set up for their family. Shields says that she makes the conversation about financial responsibility above all else to keep it light. She also let her children ask the questions, and puts it into their terms.

entry.title: Seher Kardeşini Kaybediyor Emanet 1. Bölüm

link.title: Seher Kardeşini Kaybediyor Emanet 1. Bölüm

entry.content: Eve gelen ani bir telefonla kötü haberi alan Seher hemen hastaneye koşar. Seher korku içinde beklerken doktor acı gerçeği Seher’e söyler.Karamel Yapım imzasını taşıyan Emanet, sürükleyici öyküsüyle hafta içi her gün 19:00’da Kanal 7 ekranlarında.Yönetmenler: Ayhan Özen,  Taner TunçYardımcı Yönetmen: Umut KetenGörüntü Yönetmeni: Ömer YılmazProje-Hikâye: Nazmiye YılmazOyuncular: Halil İbrahim Ceyhan, Sıla Türkoğlu, Berat Yusuf Özkan, Gülderen Güler Melih Özkaya, Tolga Pancaroğlu, Gülay Özdem, Gözde Gürkan, Hilal Yıldız, Oğuz Yağcı, Osman Aydın, Ömer Gecü, Binnaz Ekren, Zeynep Naz, Derya Ertun, Mehmet Ali Aydın, Özge Ağyar, Volkan Yıldırım, Hayat Olcay, Senaryo: Başak Yazı OdasıYapım: Karamel YapımMüzik: MinörSanat Yönetmeni: Saadet ParlakKostüm Sorumlusu: Gerçek Bitmez

Seher korku içinde beklerken doktor acı gerçeği Seher’e söyler.Karamel Yapım imzasını taşıyan Emanet, sürükleyici öyküsüyle hafta içi her gün 19:00’da Kanal 7 ekranlarında.Yönetmenler: Ayhan Özen, Taner TunçYardımcı Yönetmen: Umut KetenGörüntü Yönetmeni: Ömer YılmazProje-Hikâye: Nazmiye YılmazOyuncular: Halil İbrahim Ceyhan, Sıla Türkoğlu, Berat Yusuf Özkan, Gülderen Güler Melih Özkaya, Tolga Pancaroğlu, Gülay Özdem, Gözde Gürkan, Hilal Yıldız, Oğuz Yağcı, Osman Aydın, Ömer Gecü, Binnaz Ekren, Zeynep Naz, Derya Ertun, Mehmet Ali Aydın, Özge Ağyar, Volkan Yıldırım, Hayat Olcay, Senaryo: Başak Yazı OdasıYapım: Karamel YapımMüzik: MinörSanat Yönetmeni: Saadet ParlakKostüm Sorumlusu: Gerçek Bitmez

entry.title: Déchets électroniques : une prise de conscience fragile mais progressive

link.title: Déchets électroniques : une prise de conscience fragile mais progressive

entry.content: Caroline Salvoch et Alain Pirot, réalisateurs du documentaire "Déchets électroniques : le grand détournement", évoquent le début d’une prise de conscience.
entry.summary: Caroline Salvoch et Alain Pirot, réalisateurs du documentaire "Déchets électroniques : le grand détournement", évoquent le début d’une prise de conscience.

entry.title: Explainer: Decoding Rajnath Singh’s meet with his Chinese counterpart in Moscow

link.title: Explainer: Decoding Rajnath Singh’s meet with his Chinese counterpart in Moscow

entry.content:
Defence Minister Rajnath Singh has conveyed to his Chinese counterpart Gen. Wei Fenghe that China must strictly respect the Line of Actual Control(LAC) and not make attempts to unilaterally change its status quo.
In the first highest level face-to-face contact between the two sides after border tension erupted in eastern Ladakh in early May, Singh told Wei during their talks in Moscow that China must work with the Indian side for complete disengagement of troops at the earliest from all friction points including Pangong Lake. For more, watch the full video.
entry.summary: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh has conveyed to his Chinese counterpart Gen. Wei Fenghe that China must strictly respect the Line of Actual Control(LAC) and not make attempts to unilaterally change its status quo. In the first highest level face-to-face contact between the two sides after border tension erupted in eastern Ladakh in early May, Singh told Wei during their talks in Moscow that China must work with the Indian side for complete disengagement of troops at the earliest from all friction points including Pangong Lake. For more, watch the full video.

entry.title: Restoration work in Char Minar_ Hyderabad

link.title: Restoration work in Char Minar_ Hyderabad

entry.content: Crowd of people seen at a local market near Char Minar, Hyderabad in Andhra Pradesh. And restoration work going on at the monument. The Charminar, built in 1591 CE, is a monument and mosque located in Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh, India. The landmark has become a global icon of Hyderabad, listed among the most recognized structures of India. The Charminar is on the east bank of Musi river. To the northeast lies the Laad Bazaar and in the west end lies the granite-made richly ornamented Makkah Masjid. The English name is a transliteration and combination of the Urdu words Chār and Minar, translating to "Four Towers"; the eponymous towers are ornate minarets attached and supported by four grand arches. Source - Wikipedia This footage is part of the professionally-shot broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of imagery from South Asia. The Wilderness Films India collection comprises of thousands of hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on HDCAM 1080i High Definition, HDV and XDCAM. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Reach us at rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com.
entry.summary: Crowd of people seen at a local market near Char Minar, Hyderabad in Andhra Pradesh. And restoration work going on at the monument. The Charminar, built in 1591 CE, is a monument and mosque located in Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh, India. The landmark has become a global icon of Hyderabad, listed among the most recognized structures of India. The Charminar is on the east bank of Musi river. To the northeast lies the Laad Bazaar and in the west end lies the granite-made richly ornamented Makkah Masjid. The English name is a transliteration and combination of the Urdu words Chār and Minar, translating to "Four Towers"; the eponymous towers are ornate minarets attached and supported by four grand arches. Source - Wikipedia This footage is part of the professionally-shot broadcast stock footage archive of Wilderness Films India Ltd., the largest collection of imagery from South Asia. The Wilderness Films India collection comprises of thousands of hours of high quality broadcast imagery, mostly shot on HDCAM 1080i High Definition, HDV and XDCAM. Write to us for licensing this footage on a broadcast format, for use in your production! We are happy to be commissioned to film for you or else provide you with broadcast crewing and production solutions across South Asia. We pride ourselves in bringing the best of India and South Asia to the world… Reach us at rupindang [at] gmail [dot] com and admin@wildfilmsindia.com.

entry.title: Children With COVID-19, Flu Hospitalized At Similar Rates

link.title: Children With COVID-19, Flu Hospitalized At Similar Rates

entry.content:
Children with COVID-19 are just as likely to suffer from the flu to the same degree.
Hospitalization, admittance to ICU, and mechanical ventilation to breathe are very similar rates.
Kids with COVID: 17% required hospitalization and 6% were admitted to ICU.
Children with the flu: 21% were admitted to the hospital and 7% to an ICU.
In addition, 3% of children with COVID-19 needed mechanical ventilation to maintain breathing.
This is compared to 2% of those with the flu being put on mechanical ventilation.
entry.summary: Children with COVID-19 are just as likely to suffer from the flu to the same degree. Hospitalization, admittance to ICU, and mechanical ventilation to breathe are very similar rates. Kids with COVID: 17% required hospitalization and 6% were admitted to ICU. Children with the flu: 21% were admitted to the hospital and 7% to an ICU. In addition, 3% of children with COVID-19 needed mechanical ventilation to maintain breathing. This is compared to 2% of those with the flu being put on mechanical ventilation.

entry.title: Hospital ல ஏமாத்திடாங்க • Aadhavan கண்கலங்கிய பேட்டி #RIPVadivelBalaji

link.title: Hospital ல ஏமாத்திடாங்க • Aadhavan கண்கலங்கிய பேட்டி #RIPVadivelBalaji

entry.content: பில் கட்ட முடியாமல் போனதால் தனியார் மருத்துவமனை வடிவேல் பாலாஜியை நள்ளிரவில் வெளியேற்றியதாக நடிகர் ஆதவன் தெரிவித்திருப்பது பரபரப்பை ஏற்படுத்தியுள்ளது.
entry.summary: பில் கட்ட முடியாமல் போனதால் தனியார் மருத்துவமனை வடிவேல் பாலாஜியை நள்ளிரவில் வெளியேற்றியதாக நடிகர் ஆதவன் தெரிவித்திருப்பது பரபரப்பை ஏற்படுத்தியுள்ளது.

entry.title: Le frère de Tariq Ramadan remet en cause les attentats du 11 Septembre

link.title: Le frère de Tariq Ramadan remet en cause les attentats du 11 Septembre

entry.content: Depuis avril 2017, Hani Ramadan, directeur du Centre islamique de Genève, est interdit de séjour en France. Les autorités lui reprochent d’avoir adopté un comportement et tenu des propos « faisant peser une menace grave sur l’ordre public sur le sol français ». Le 5 août dernier, le ministère de l’Intérieur a renouvelé son interdiction de séjour. Il a également renouvelé le gel des fonds et des ressources que Hani Ramadan posséderait dans l’Hexagone.
entry.summary: Depuis avril 2017, Hani Ramadan, directeur du Centre islamique de Genève, est interdit de séjour en France. Les autorités lui reprochent d’avoir adopté un comportement et tenu des propos « faisant peser une menace grave sur l’ordre public sur le sol français ». Le 5 août dernier, le ministère de l’Intérieur a renouvelé son interdiction de séjour. Il a également renouvelé le gel des fonds et des ressources que Hani Ramadan posséderait dans l’Hexagone.

China hands over 5 Indians who went missing from Arunachal Pradesh
China hands over 5 Indians who went missing from Arunachal Pradesh
entry.summary: Indian Army has now taken the custody of all five men in Kibithu after completing all formalities.China hands over 5 Indians who went missing from Arunachal Pradesh China hands over 5 Indians who went missing from Arunachal Pradesh China hands over 5 Indians who went missing from Arunachal Pradesh

entry.title: Giant gold Buddha statue appears to move mysteriously along highway

link.title: Giant gold Buddha statue appears to move mysteriously along highway

entry.content:
This is the bizarre moment a giant gold Buddha appeared to be levitating and moving on its own.
The religious statue was seen on a raised highway in Bangkok, Thailand, on August 28.
Locals living in an apartment block opposite noticed the shiny gold idol - often connected with supernatural powers.
So they were amazed when the Buddha - highly revered in Thailand - began appearing mysteriously hovering along the road.
The actual explanation was that the statue was being transported on the back of a pickup truck which was not visible due to the raised barrier on the side of the highway.
entry.summary: This is the bizarre moment a giant gold Buddha appeared to be levitating and moving on its own. The religious statue was seen on a raised highway in Bangkok, Thailand, on August 28. Locals living in an apartment block opposite noticed the shiny gold idol - often connected with supernatural powers. So they were amazed when the Buddha - highly revered in Thailand - began appearing mysteriously hovering along the road. The actual explanation was that the statue was being transported on the back of a pickup truck which was not visible due to the raised barrier on the side of the highway.

entry.title: India-வுக்கு எதிராக போராட Nepal குழுக்களுக்கு china உதவி?

link.title: India-வுக்கு எதிராக போராட Nepal குழுக்களுக்கு china உதவி?

entry.content:

Source said China funding anti-india stir on nepal border
entry.summary: இந்தியாவுக்கு எதிராக போராட நேபாள குழுக்களுக்கு சீனா நிதி உதவி? Source said China funding anti-india stir on nepal border

entry.title: Viral Kerumunan Cafe di Jepara Saat Live Music, Pemkab Lakukan Tes Corona Massal

link.title: Viral Kerumunan Cafe di Jepara Saat Live Music, Pemkab Lakukan Tes Corona Massal

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Polisi membubarkan acara live musik di sebuah kafe di Jepara yang dihadiri ratusan pengunjung dan mengabaikan protokol kesehatan .
Ini adalah kerumunan pengunjung sebuah kafe di Jepara, Jawa Tengah yang menggelar live musik.
Bukan hanya warga yang berkerumun dan tidak menjaga jarak, tak sedikit pengunung yang tidak menggunakan masker.
Kegiatan yang melanggar protokol kesehatan ini langsung dibubarkan petugas.
Bupati Jepara dian kristiandi telah memberikan sanksi tegas kepada pemilik kafe.
Kafe yang menggelar acara live musik telah disegel.
Pemkab Jepara juga akan melakukan tes covid 19 terhadap pemilik dan karyawan kafe.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Polisi membubarkan acara live musik di sebuah kafe di Jepara yang dihadiri ratusan pengunjung dan mengabaikan protokol kesehatan . Ini adalah kerumunan pengunjung sebuah kafe di Jepara, Jawa Tengah yang menggelar live musik. Bukan hanya warga yang berkerumun dan tidak menjaga jarak, tak sedikit pengunung yang tidak menggunakan masker. Kegiatan yang melanggar protokol kesehatan ini langsung dibubarkan petugas. Bupati Jepara dian kristiandi telah memberikan sanksi tegas kepada pemilik kafe. Kafe yang menggelar acara live musik telah disegel. Pemkab Jepara juga akan melakukan tes covid 19 terhadap pemilik dan karyawan kafe.

entry.title: [Top 3 News] Kecelakaan Tol Cipali I Ridwan Kamil Komentar PSBB DKI I Pengusaha Warteg Ketar Ketir

link.title: [Top 3 News] Kecelakaan Tol Cipali I Ridwan Kamil Komentar PSBB DKI I Pengusaha Warteg Ketar Ketir

entry.content:
[Top 3 News] Kecelakaan Tol Cipali I Ridwan Kamil Komentar PSBB DKI I Pengusaha Warteg Ketar Ketir
Kecelakaan beruntun terjadi di Tol Cipali KM 84, dari arah Palimanan menuju Cikopo. Sebuah bus tiba-tiba menabrak minibus dan truk yang tengah berhenti di bahu jalan karena pecah ban. Akibatnya, truk yang ditabrak pun terguling. Kasat PJR Polda Jawa Barat mengatakan, akibat dari kejadian ini, dua orang meninggal dunia, dua orang mengalami luka berat, sementara enam orang lainnya luka ringan. Korban langsung dilarikan ke Rumah Sakit Abdul Rojak Purwakarta. Gubernur jawa barat Ridwan Kamil menanggapi kebijakan Pemprov DKI untuk menetapkan kembali PSBB total. Ia mengusulkan kepada Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan, agar mengkonsultasikan terlebih dahulu kepada pemerintah pusat terkait usulan PSBB total di DKI. Ridwan Kamil menyebut, wilayah bodebek adalah satu rumpun dengan DKI dalam penanganan covid 19, sehingga bodebek akan menyesuaikan dengan kebijakan di DKI Jakarta. Keputusan Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan untuk kembali menerapkan PSBB total membuat pengusaha warteg khawatir. Mereka takut pendapatan mereka akan kembali turun hingga di atas 60 persen. Para pedagang ini berharap agar pemerintah dapat segera menanggulangi covid 19 di indonesia agar semua kembali seperti biasanya.
entry.summary: [Top 3 News] Kecelakaan Tol Cipali I Ridwan Kamil Komentar PSBB DKI I Pengusaha Warteg Ketar Ketir Kecelakaan beruntun terjadi di Tol Cipali KM 84, dari arah Palimanan menuju Cikopo. Sebuah bus tiba-tiba menabrak minibus dan truk yang tengah berhenti di bahu jalan karena pecah ban. Akibatnya, truk yang ditabrak pun terguling. Kasat PJR Polda Jawa Barat mengatakan, akibat dari kejadian ini, dua orang meninggal dunia, dua orang mengalami luka berat, sementara enam orang lainnya luka ringan. Korban langsung dilarikan ke Rumah Sakit Abdul Rojak Purwakarta. Gubernur jawa barat Ridwan Kamil menanggapi kebijakan Pemprov DKI untuk menetapkan kembali PSBB total. Ia mengusulkan kepada Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan, agar mengkonsultasikan terlebih dahulu kepada pemerintah pusat terkait usulan PSBB total di DKI. Ridwan Kamil menyebut, wilayah bodebek adalah satu rumpun dengan DKI dalam penanganan covid 19, sehingga bodebek akan menyesuaikan dengan kebijakan di DKI Jakarta. Keputusan Gubernur DKI Jakarta Anies Baswedan untuk kembali menerapkan PSBB total membuat pengusaha warteg khawatir. Mereka takut pendapatan mereka akan kembali turun hingga di atas 60 persen. Para pedagang ini berharap agar pemerintah dapat segera menanggulangi covid 19 di indonesia agar semua kembali seperti biasanya.

entry.title: இன்று Neet தேர்வு.. நாடு முழுக்க 15 லட்சம் பேர் எழுதுகிறார்கள்

link.title: இன்று Neet தேர்வு.. நாடு முழுக்க 15 லட்சம் பேர் எழுதுகிறார்கள்

entry.content:
நாடு முழுக்க இந்த முறை நீட் தேர்வை 15 லட்சம் பேர் எழுதுகிறார்கள். இதற்காக தீவிர ஏற்பாடுகள் நடந்து வருகிறது. தமிழகத்தில் நீட் தேர்வு எழுதும் மாணவர்கள் எண்ணிக்கை சரிந்துள்ளது.
Neet Exam 2020: no of students to appear in the exam declined 17% compared last year in Tamilnadu
entry.summary: நாடு முழுக்க இந்த முறை நீட் தேர்வை 15 லட்சம் பேர் எழுதுகிறார்கள். இதற்காக தீவிர ஏற்பாடுகள் நடந்து வருகிறது. தமிழகத்தில் நீட் தேர்வு எழுதும் மாணவர்கள் எண்ணிக்கை சரிந்துள்ளது. Neet Exam 2020: no of students to appear in the exam declined 17% compared last year in Tamilnadu

entry.title: Time for change, says LDP chief who aims to dethrone Sabah PKR chief

link.title: Time for change, says LDP chief who aims to dethrone Sabah PKR chief

entry.content:
Wisma Wanita, Kota Kinabalu - LDP president Chin Su Phing, who is contesting for the Api-api seat arrived at the nomination centre at around 8.20am.
"We hope the rakyat can vote for a local party, it is time for us to change," he said.
Chin, who is making his election debut, added that LDP will contest 46 seats in total.
entry.summary: Wisma Wanita, Kota Kinabalu - LDP president Chin Su Phing, who is contesting for the Api-api seat arrived at the nomination centre at around 8.20am. "We hope the rakyat can vote for a local party, it is time for us to change," he said. Chin, who is making his election debut, added that LDP will contest 46 seats in total.

entry.title: Emmanuel Macron, candidat de la droite en 2022 ? Les Français s’y opposent

link.title: Emmanuel Macron, candidat de la droite en 2022 ? Les Français s’y opposent

entry.content: La proposition du maire LR de Nice Christian Estrosi n’a pas encore été adoubée. Selon un sondage Ifop paru dans Le Journal du dimanche du 6 septembre, 65 % des Français interrogés se déclarent contre un soutien de la droite à Emmanuel Macron pour l’élection présidentielle de 2022. Seuls 35 % des sondés ont répondu « oui » (10 « tout à fait » et 25 « plutôt ») à la question « Pensez-vous que la droite (c’est-à-dire le parti Les Républicains) doit soutenir Emmanuel Macron comme candidat à l’élection présidentielle de 2022 ? ».
entry.summary: La proposition du maire LR de Nice Christian Estrosi n’a pas encore été adoubée. Selon un sondage Ifop paru dans Le Journal du dimanche du 6 septembre, 65 % des Français interrogés se déclarent contre un soutien de la droite à Emmanuel Macron pour l’élection présidentielle de 2022. Seuls 35 % des sondés ont répondu « oui » (10 « tout à fait » et 25 « plutôt ») à la question « Pensez-vous que la droite (c’est-à-dire le parti Les Républicains) doit soutenir Emmanuel Macron comme candidat à l’élection présidentielle de 2022 ? ».
